/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libur_hardware.so -o libur_hardware.so CMakeFiles/ur_hardware.dir/src/hardware/ur_hardware.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hrlsh/scrub_nurse_ws/build/ur_robot_manager:/usr/local/lib: libur_robot_manager_utils.so /usr/local/lib/librtde.so.1.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.71.0 -lpthread
